evals.description: Trigger test: activates on GDPR compliance question
evals.prompt: We're launching a B2C product in Germany and France. What do we need to do to be GDPR compliant before launch?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on CCPA compliance question
evals.prompt: Our SaaS app has over 100,000 California users. Someone told us we need to comply with CCPA. What does that actually require us to do?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on cookie consent / consent management question
evals.prompt: Our website drops Google Analytics and some ad pixels. Do we need a cookie banner and what should it do?

evals.description: Core task: designing a valid GDPR consent mechanism
evals.prompt: We want to ask users for consent to send marketing emails. What makes consent valid under GDPR and how should we implement the opt-in flow?

evals.description: Core task: handling a Subject Access Request
evals.prompt: A user emailed us saying they want a copy of all the data we hold about them. We've never handled one of these before. What do we do and what's the deadline?

evals.description: Core task: implementing a right to erasure / deletion request
evals.prompt: A user is asking us to delete all their data under GDPR's right to be forgotten. What systems do we need to wipe and are there any exceptions?
We're building a feature that uses ML to score users' creditworthiness based on their in-app behavior. Our legal team says we need a DPIA. What does that involve?

evals.description: Core task: implementing data retention schedules
evals.prompt: We've been keeping all user data indefinitely because we never thought about deletion. How do we build a proper data retention policy and enforce it technically?

evals.description: Core task: choosing the right cross-border transfer mechanism
evals.prompt: We're a German company and our US-based data processor needs to store some EU user data in AWS us-east-1. What do we need to put in place legally and technically?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns against dark patterns in consent UI
evals.prompt: Our designer wants to make the 'Accept all' button bright green and the 'Reject all' option a small grey text link at the bottom. Is that okay?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns against collecting data without lawful basis
evals.prompt: We want to collect users' location data, browsing history, and device fingerprints because it might be useful for future product features. Is that okay under GDPR?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend legitimate interests for high-risk processing without LIA
evals.prompt: Can we use legitimate interests as the lawful basis for processing sensitive health data for targeted advertising?

assertions.value: legitimate interests is fine for health data
